title: This Outdoor Boys Video Was Dead...Then It Exploded!

transcript.text: Changing a thumbnail on an underperforming video in the first few [music] hours boosted its success and it went on to do great numbers for us. But for every one of those successful examples, there's 10 more unsuccessful ones. But here's one we didn't really obsess over at all and it blew up much later. The video was called The Unexpected Rise of the Outdoor Boys and at the time it was uploaded, it was [music] a complete dud. We kind of just moved on. But let me show you the back end of this video because it's pretty fascinating. When it didn't land with our audience, instead of panicking and trying to update the title or the thumbnail, we just kind of left it alone [music] and then only 230 days later, it found its audience. And now it's sitting at 780,000 views. It turns out something else going on in the Outdoor Boys Cinematic Universe eventually got this video recommended to those viewers [music] and they enjoyed it. And if we sat there and tried to min-max them to death, that's time we could have been spending making new videos.
